2606.26571.title: Zero-shot Tweet-Level Stance Detection Enhanced by External Knowledge and Reflective Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
2606.26571.paper_summary: Zero-shot tweet-level stance detection confronts two primary challenges: (1) mitigating the context sparsity inherent in short texts, and (2) establishing the relevance between implicit targets and textual content. While existing methods primarily focus on incorporating external knowledge, they neglect the intrinsic semantic cues embedded within key intra-textual entities. Furthermore, current models exhibit limited capability in determining the relevance of unseen targets to the given text, thereby struggling to differentiate between "neutral" and "irrelevant" stance labels. To address these issues, we first construct a four-class, multi-topic Japanese tweet dataset. To our knowledge, this is the first Japanese tweet-level dataset for stance detection. We then propose KIRP, a zero-shot stance detection framework. It integrates external knowledge with entity reorganization for data augmentation and employs prompt chaining for reasoning. Specifically, the framework incorporates knowledge graphs to supplement and reorganize key textual entities, while reflective Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning extracts and validates implicit targets. To better distinguish "neutral" from "irrelevant" labels, we adopt stance-aware contrastive learning to capture discriminative features and design a three-layer iterative prototype network for fine-grained classification. Experimental results on SemEval-2016, WT-WT, and KIRP-D show that KIRP achieves state-of-the-art performance. KIRP obtains F1 scores of 84.05% (three-class) on SemEval-2016, and 84.99% and 79.18% (four-class) on WT-WT and KIRP-D, respectively.
2606.26571.paper_summary_zh: 零-shot 推文層級立場檢測面臨兩個主要挑戰： (1) 減輕短文本中固有的上下文稀疏性，和 (2) 確立隱性目標與文本內容之間的相關性。雖然現有方法主要集中於融入外部知識，但它們忽略了嵌入於關鍵內部文本實體中的內在語義線索。此外，當前模型在確定未見目標與給定文本的相關性方面能力有限，因此難以區分「中立」和「無關」的立場標籤。為了解決這些問題，我們首先構建了一個四類、多主題的日文推文數據集。據我們所知，這是第一個用於立場檢測的日文推文層級數據集。我們接著提出了 KIRP，一個零-shot 立場檢測框架。它將外部知識與實體重組相結合以進行數據增強，並採用提示鏈進行推理。具體而言，該框架整合知識圖譜以補充和重組關鍵文本實體，而反思性思維鏈（CoT）推理則提取並驗證隱性目標。為了更好地區分「中立」與「無關」標籤，我們採用立場感知對比學習來捕捉區分特徵，並設計了一個三層迭代原型網絡以進行細粒度分類。在 SemEval-2016、WT-WT 和 KIRP-D 上的實驗結果顯示，KIRP 達到了最先進的性能。KIRP 在 SemEval-2016 上獲得了 84.05%（三類）的 F1 分數，在 WT-WT 和 KIRP-D 上分別為 84.99% 和 79.18%（四類）。
2606.26571.author: Yiju Huang et.al.
2606.26571.authors: Yiju Huang, Wenxian Wang, Lijun Zhou, Rui Tang, Xiao Lan, Tao Zhang, Haizhou Wang
